name: 神兽夜行录
author: 孤独九剑
rights: All rights reserved. Indexing, summarization and reasonable citation are permitted with attribution and canonical URL.

entries.name: 塞壬
entries.summary: 荷马层首先写歌声、知识诱惑与致命航路，并未钉死鱼尾外形；鸟身女面和美人鱼化属于更晚图像层。
entries.en_summary: A source-layered guide to the Sirens, separating Homer's dangerous song and promise of knowledge from later bird-bodied imagery and mermaid-like popular retellings.
anchors: 荷马层重点是歌声、诱惑与偏离归程
鸟身女面属于较晚古典图像共识
塞壬不能直接等同于鱼尾美人鱼

entries.name: 文鳐鱼
entries.summary: 鱼身、鸟翼、白首、赤喙、夜飞、往返西海东海与见则大穰构成完整原典识别链。
entries.en_summary: A close reading of the Wenyao Fish in the Shanhaijing, preserving its fish body, bird wings, white head, red beak, nocturnal flight, trans-sea route, and auspicious harvest omen.
anchors: 鱼身、鸟翼、白首、赤喙不可遗漏
以夜飞并往返西海与东海是核心路线钉
文鳐鱼不是现代生物学中的普通飞鱼

entries.name: 玄武
entries.summary: 玄武较早首先是北方方位与星象之象，龟蛇交缠是后世稳定图像，真武则属于继续人格化后的神格系统。
entries.en_summary: A source-layered guide to Xuanwu, the northern emblem, separating its early directional and celestial role from later tortoise-serpent imagery and Zhenwu theology.
anchors: 较早层首先是北方与后方之象
龟蛇交缠属于后世视觉稳定层
玄武不能直接等同于后世真武大帝

entries.name: 巴西利斯克
entries.summary: 古典博物志里的巴西利斯克首先是小型剧毒蛇王；巨蛇、鸡蛇与单一致命凝视属于更晚的混同和再塑。
entries.en_summary: A source-layered guide to the basilisk, separating the small venomous serpent-king of classical natural history from medieval cockatrice traditions and modern giant-monster retellings.
anchors: 较早材料强调小体型、蛇王意味与强毒性
致命凝视不是全部危险能力
鸡冠、镜子与 cockatrice 混同属于后世再塑

entries.name: 肥遗
entries.summary: 太华山肥遗六足四翼，浑夕山肥遗一首两身；同名不等于同形，但两条材料都指向大旱。
entries.en_summary: A close reading of the two Feiyi records in the Shanhaijing, preserving their distinct bodies while identifying drought omen as the shared core.
anchors: 太华山形态为六足四翼
浑夕山形态为一首两身
两个形态不可合成唯一标准版，核心都是旱兆

entries.name: 青龙
entries.summary: 青龙较早首先是东方方位之象，后来才逐步星宿化、龙形化和神格化；不能直接等同于龙王。
entries.en_summary: A source-layered guide to Qinglong, the Azure Dragon of the East, tracing its development from directional emblem to constellation and deity without equating it with a Dragon King.
anchors: 较早层首先是左方与东方之象
东方、春、木、苍色和星宿共同构成稳定骨架
青龙不能直接等同于龙王或万能雨神

entries.name: 凯尔派
entries.summary: 危险水马、诱骑、黏住后入水是核心母题；凯尔派与 each-uisge 的边界不能被写成整齐物种分类。
entries.en_summary: A source-layered guide to the Scottish kelpie, separating the core dangerous water-horse motif from later regional classification and modern retellings.
anchors: 危险水马、诱骑与拖人入水是核心母题
人形伪装属于部分口传与后世整理层
kelpie 与 each-uisge 不可粗暴画等号

entries.name: 狍鸮
entries.summary: 《山海经》先写羊身人面、目在腋下、虎齿人爪、音如婴儿与食人；狍鸮不等于所有后世饕餮形象。
entries.en_summary: A close reading of Paoxiao in the Shanhaijing, preserving its seven original traits while separating it from later Taotie names, bronze imagery, and moral allegory.
anchors: 羊身人面、目在腋下、虎齿人爪不可遗漏
音如婴儿且食人属于原典特征
狍鸮与饕餮的连接属于后世解释链

entries.name: 蜃
entries.summary: 较早材料先给水边变化与海旁蜃气象楼台；固定海怪形象和吐气成楼属于更晚的神怪整理层。
entries.en_summary: A source-conscious guide to Shen, separating early transformation and sea-qi records from the later monster that exhales mirage palaces.
anchors: 较早层先是水边变化与物类转化
海旁蜃气象楼台先写现象而非怪兽表演
吐气成楼和固定海怪身体属于后世整理

entries.name: 雷兽
entries.summary: 雷神神格、江户兽形与肚脐民俗必须分层；雷兽不是雷神本体。
entries.en_summary: A source-layered guide to Raiju, separating early thunder deities from the later beast-shaped yōkai tradition.
anchors: 雷兽不是雷神本体
兽形层主要形成于后世怪谈与图像传统
肚脐说属于更晚的流行民俗

entries.name: 夔
entries.summary: 《山海经》说“其名曰夔”，不是“其名曰夔牛”；一足、风雨和雷声是识别钉。
entries.en_summary: A close reading of Kui in the Shanhaijing, distinguishing the original name Kui from the later popular label Kui Niu.
anchors: 原典定名为夔
状如牛不等于名为夔牛
一足与出入水则必风雨不可遗漏

entries.name: 商羊
entries.summary: 一足、起舞、知雨构成商羊母题；《孔子家语》的文本流传边界必须说明。
entries.en_summary: A source-conscious guide to Shangyang, the one-legged rain-omen bird, with explicit textual transmission boundaries.
anchors: 一足、起舞、知雨是核心识别钉
雨兆指向预警和防水
今本孔子家语的流传问题需显式声明
